conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times.
new_constraint: Do not use the keyword "upcoming" in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times. Do not use the keyword "upcoming" in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry about Future Exhibitions at [Gallery Name]

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of the collections at [Gallery Name] and have been particularly drawn to your focus on [Mention a specific style, artist, or area of art the gallery features, e.g., contemporary sculpture, abstract expressionism]. I would love to learn more about the programming you have planned for the near future.

Could you please provide information regarding your future exhibitions? I am very interested in seeing details about your upcoming exhibitions and how I can view them—whether through a calendar, website link, or physical brochure.

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing about your schedule of events and your forthcoming exhibitions.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]<turn|>
